chunks.text: Arthur R. Bergen | EECS at UC Berkeley Arthur R. Bergen: Faculty Home Page Arthur R. Bergen Former Professor Emeritus Biography Prof. Bergen was first appointed as an EECS faculty member in 1958, and retired in 1991. His research interests were Power Systems; Stability; and System Control Theory. He passed away in July 2014. Selected Honors and Awards Berkeley Citation , 1991 Institute of Electrical & Electronics Engineers (IEEE) Fellow , 1984
